summary: Static code review and TypeScript compilation check for 'Reset All Data' feature in React Native/Expo app. All implementation requirements verified correct.
critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testid attributes are present: reset-all-data-button, confirm-reset-button, cancel-reset-button
resetBadges function correctly re-initializes from BADGE_DEFINITIONS and clears pendingCelebrations
confirmResetAllData calls all 9 required reset methods: clearAllEntries, resetBadges, resetStats, resetSettings, clearPin, clearCorrections, clearSubscription, removePin, resetOnboarding
Danger Zone section is properly positioned at bottom of ScrollView with appropriate warning styling
TypeScript compilation passes for settings.tsx and badges-store.ts (only unrelated CSS import warning in index.ts)

success_rate.backend: N/A - React Native app, no backend APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. No web frontend exists for Playwright testing. Testing was done via static code analysis and TypeScript compilation. The 'Reset All Data' feature implementation is complete and correct.

danger_zone_section.notes: Section at bottom of ScrollView with red/danger styling, AlertTriangle icon, descriptive text
